title: Iran’s Soccer Team Allowed Into U.S. for World Cup, but Many Staff Denied
summary_full: After months of doubts over their participation, Iran’s players have received visas for the United States just days before the World Cup begins.
summary_public: After months of doubts over their participation, Iran’s players have received visas for the United States just days before the World Cup begins.
